content.text: are standalone pieces of content (documents, code, diagrams, mini‑apps, etc.) that Claude creates in a dedicated pane alongside the chat instead of just inline text.
They act like lightweight files inside Claude: you can open, view, edit, and reuse them across a conversation or project, rather than losing them in the scrollback.
Typical artifact types: documents, code files or scripts, simple websites (single‑page HTML), SVG graphics, diagrams/flowcharts, charts, and interactive React components or small tools.
